title: Mint Fizz and Silver Halo are live
summary: Two new Shadow Chat themes are here: a fresh mint-green glass theme and a sleek graphite theme with silver/chrome accents.

sections.heading: New Themes
items: Mint Fizz adds a light mint-glass look with aqua shine, soft lime glow, bubbly pearl surfaces, and fresh green accents.
Silver Halo adds a dark graphite-glass look with chrome ribbons, silver controls, and cool blue shine.
Both themes include generated backdrop, texture, and picker preview assets so each one feels like its own full look.

sections.heading: Where To Find Them
items: Open Settings, then Color & Layout, and choose Mint Fizz or Silver Halo from the theme cards.
The update popup now previews new theme drops with theme artwork, so future launches can show the look before you switch.

sections.heading: Restart Required
items: Restarting or refreshing makes sure the new theme assets, picker cards, and popup styling load together.
Older app sessions will be prompted to restart before continuing.
